# Third-Party Notices

This file enumerates the third-party software bundled by CloudSaw and the
licenses under which we redistribute them. The authoritative version is
**regenerated by the release pipeline (Contract 16)** from `Cargo.lock` and
`package-lock.json`, so the list below is a hand-maintained seed and will be
expanded automatically before each release.

CloudSaw itself is distributed under the Apache License 2.0 (see `LICENSE`).

---

## Bundled external binaries (separate-process aggregation)

These are invoked at runtime as separate processes; they are not statically
linked into the CloudSaw binary.

| Component   | Upstream                                              | License            | Notes |
| ----------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | ------------------ | ----- |
| ScoutSuite  | https://github.com/nccgroup/ScoutSuite                | GPL-2.0 *          | Source mirrored under `vendor/scoutsuite/`. Pinned version + SHA-256 recorded in Contract 06. |
| Terraform   | https://www.terraform.io                              | MPL-2.0            | Bundled binary per platform. Pinned version + SHA-256 recorded in Contract 05. |

\* The upstream ScoutSuite project has historically been licensed under
GPL-2.0; the fork at `vendor/scoutsuite/LICENSE` currently shows Apache 2.0.
Contract 06 will reconcile this and pin the licensing decision against the
exact upstream commit we bundle.

---

## Rust crates (compiled into the binary)

Direct dependencies (from `src-tauri/Cargo.toml`):

| Crate     | License             |
| --------- | ------------------- |
| tauri     | Apache-2.0 / MIT    |
| serde     | Apache-2.0 / MIT    |
| serde_json| Apache-2.0 / MIT    |
| rusqlite  | MIT                 |
| thiserror | Apache-2.0 / MIT    |
| chrono    | Apache-2.0 / MIT    |
| dirs      | Apache-2.0 / MIT    |
| libc      | Apache-2.0 / MIT    |

Transitive crates and their licenses will be enumerated by the release
pipeline's `cargo about` step.

---

## npm packages (compiled into the renderer bundle)

Direct dependencies (from `package.json`):

| Package              | License    |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| @tauri-apps/api      | Apache-2.0 / MIT |
| @tauri-apps/cli      | Apache-2.0 / MIT |
| react                | MIT        |
| react-dom            | MIT        |
| typescript           | Apache-2.0 |
| vite                 | MIT        |
| @vitejs/plugin-react | MIT        |
| tailwindcss          | MIT        |
| postcss              | MIT        |
| autoprefixer         | MIT        |

Transitive packages will be enumerated by the release pipeline's `license-checker`
step.
